data.title: Inventor creates speech therapy game tokens for kids aged 4-9, aims to boost engagement and target speech sounds.
data.description: A speech/language pathologist from San Diego, California, introduced a novel method to target speech sounds for children aged 4 to 9. The new approach involves a range of play-based tasks to enhance engagement during therapy sessions. This innovative technique aims to make speech therapy more interactive and effective for young learners. The inventor shared this idea at a conference in Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026. The goal is to improve speech skills in a fun and stimulating way, catering to the specific needs of this age group.

data.title: Stan Kroenke is now America's largest landowner with almost 1 million acres in New Mexico; top 100 list for 2026 released.
data.description: In the latest ranking of the 100 largest landowners for 2026, Stan Kroenke has claimed the top position, surpassing others in the list. Red Emmerson secured the second spot, followed by John Malone at third, and Ted Turner at the fourth position. The shift in rankings was announced on January 13, 2026, in Des Moines, Iowa. Stan Kroenke solidified his position by acquiring nearly 1 million acres in New Mexico from the heirs of a notable estate, further solidifying his standing as the largest landholder in America.

data.title: Audrey Nuna starts $1M campaign for Luminos Fund post MrBeast Challenge. Nonprofit aids vulnerable kids in education.
data.description: A fundraising campaign has been initiated by award-winning singer Audrey Nuna in support of The Luminos Fund, an international nonprofit assisting vulnerable children in catching up and excelling in school. The campaign, welcomed by the fund, comes after Audrey Nuna's participation as a finalist in a competition. The initiative aims to raise vital funds for these children and their education.

data.title: TCL Note A1 NXTPAPER wins awards at CES, launches pre-sale with innovative display technology.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Irvine, California, the TCL Note A1 NXTPAPER was showcased at CES 2026. This e-note device, equipped with TCL's innovative NXTPAPER display technology, stood out for its immersive paper-like display. The device drew significant attention at the event for its cutting-edge visuals, attracting a large audience.

data.title: MGallery Collection reveals expansion plans for 2026 across captivating destinations worldwide. Paris, Jan 13, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Announcing a fresh initiative by MGallery Collection, featuring a range of alluring locations and warm hospitality. On January 13, 2026, MGallery Collection disclosed their latest offerings, spanning from the picturesque Noosa in Australia to the pristine Maldives waters, and from the scenic Oléron Island in France. This new chapter embodies the brand's commitment to providing enriching experiences in diverse destinations.

data.title: Inturai Ventures updates trading code to URAIF on U.S. OTC market, reflecting corporate rebrand. Shares now tradable on Trade Republic.
data.description: Investor@inturai.com has announced that the trading code for URAIF on the U.S. OTC market has been updated from URAI to URAIF, to match the Company's rebranding efforts. This change aligns its U.S. market presence with its global identity. The company's shares are currently available for trading on Trade Republic.

data.title: Northern Virginia housing market in 2025 showed balance and resilience with measured optimism, reflecting long-term norms.
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia, on January 13, 2026, recent data reveals a balanced and resilient housing market in Northern Virginia as 2025 came to a close. Sales trends, pricing, and inventory levels indicate a market that is realigning with long-term norms. The numbers suggest a sense of cautious optimism as the market continues to recalibrate, with sales showing stability and prices reflecting a more sustainable growth trajectory. The data paints a picture of a market that is finding equilibrium, giving hope for a steady and healthy real estate environment in the future.

data.title: Woodford Reserve's Double Double Oaked Bourbon returning nationally for release, known for its deep richness.
data.description: Tomorrow, Woodford Reserve Double Double Oaked Bourbon, known as one of the most sought-after American whiskey bottles, will make its return and be accessible nationwide at premium retailers and specific domestic military exchange outlets. Initially introduced in 2015 as part of the Distillery Series, Double Double Oaked has garnered a loyal fan base due to its profound richness and intricate flavors. This exclusive offering showcases Woodford Reserve's commitment to pioneering spirits and skilled craftsmanship.

data.title: Sports Facilities Companies partners with Legacy Sports Group; adds William R. Knox, Sr. in key role. Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: Internationally recognized sports tourism expert William R. Knox, Sr. has joined SFC in a strategic partnership. SFC, known for its expertise in sports, recreation planning, and management, welcomes Knox to its team. The collaboration was announced in Clearwater, Florida on Jan. 13, 2026.

data.title: Maryland lawmakers and advocates push for reforms to prevent Legionella spread, legislation could save lives.
data.description: Legislation recently introduced in Maryland is designed to enhance water quality management, potentially leading to saving numerous lives, as stated by the Alliance to Prevent Legionnaires Disease (APLD). The legislation, filed on Jan. 13, 2026, focuses on implementing extensive reforms to address the issue. This proposed legislation has garnered support from various stakeholders, including the APLD, with efforts directed towards enhancing public health and safety. The measures are expected to make a significant impact in improving water quality standards, with the potential to positively impact an estimated number of individuals.

data.title: Crypto analyst predicts Bitcoin will end year higher, potential $95 billion monthly trading volume by 2026. Neobanks to breakout.
data.description: A well-known crypto analyst, Miles Deutscher, has highlighted key themes expected to influence the digital asset markets in 2026, as well as his forecast for Bitcoin's price by the end of the year. Deutscher predicts that prediction markets will observe substantial growth, with monthly volumes potentially skyrocketing to about $95 billion, which is five times the current levels, for at least one month in 2026. He attributes this expected boost to the introduction of new product formats like leveraged prediction markets. Deutscher also pointed out the potential rise of crypto-native and stablecoin-focused neobanks as a breakthrough sector. He believes that the enhancement of infrastructure and increasing demand, especially in developing markets, are major factors propelling these platforms.

data.title: Vericel stock rises due to strong Q4 and 2025 revenue expectations - $276 million revenue and 23% growth in Q4. Company aiming for profitability.
data.description: Vericel Corporation (NASDAQ: VCEL) stock rose following the company's announcement of strong preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. The company expects total net revenue for 2025 to be around $276 million, with MACI net revenue reaching $239.5 million, a 23% growth in the fourth quarter. Vericel also anticipates achieving GAAP net income profitability for the second consecutive year, with a gross margin of 74%. The company highlighted operational achievements, including the highest number of MACI implants and trained surgeons in any quarter since the product's launch. Vericel, with over 900 MACI-trained surgeons and plans to launch commercial manufacturing in a new facility in 2026, is set for continued growth. The company ended the period with about $200 million.
